title: Fresh Simple Trailer Theme
description: Modpack themed like minecraft trailers, while being simple!
body:
**This modpack aims to make your experience on Minecraft feel like the trailers, whilst keeping it simple!**

## Mods
```
⚙️ Mods Used: (33)
1. BSL [Shaders]
2. Bare Bones [Resource Pack]
3. Bare Bones x Eating Animation [Resource Pack]
4. Bare Bones x Fresh Animations [Resource Pack]
5. Fabric API [Mod]
6. Fresh Animations [Resource Pack]
7. Iris Shaders [Mod]
8. Minimalistic Font [Resource Pack]
9. Sodium [Mod]
10. Entity Model Features [Mod]
11. Entity Texture Features [Mod]
12. Lithium (Mod)
13. FerriteCore (Mod)
14. Dynamic FPS (Mod)
15. Cubes Without Borders (Mod)
16. Forge Config API Port (Mod)
17. Fresh Animations: Player Extension [Resource Pack]
18. Particular: Reforged (Mod)
19. Visuality (Mod)
20. BSL.txt (File)
21. Cloth Config API (Mod)
22. Mod Menu (Mod)
23. Hold my Items (Mod)
24. Ambient Sounds (Mod)
25. Immediately Fast (Mod) 
26. Entity Culling (Mod)
27. CreativeCore (Mod)
28. 3D Skin Layers (Mod)
29. Make bubbles pop (Mod)
30. Sound Physics Remastered (Mod)
31. Presence Footsteps (Mod)
32. Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks (Mod)
33. Essential Mod (Mod)
```

## Other
Fabric 1.21.11

1st Modpack i have created, in fact.

⚠️: **This Modpack is not meant to copy another modpack**

# 💻 Owner Hardware
Now, i don't know what the minimum hardware to run this mod may be, but i can put out my PC Specs (I get Smooth Gameplay)


```
CPU: AMD Ryzen 4500, 6 Cores, 12 Threads
GPU: Nvidia Geforce RTX 3060, 12GB VRAM
RAM: 16GB Single RAM Stick
```

